user.title: Connect to Poolex Silverline
user.description: Enter the heat pump's local network details and Tuya credentials. The device must be on the same network as Home Assistant; the Smart Life app should not be connected at the same time.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the heat pump on the LAN.
data_description.device_id: Tuya device ID (22 hex characters), found in the Smart Life developer console or via tinytuya scan.
data_description.local_key: 16-character device-specific encryption key from the Tuya cloud.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Poolex Silverline
reauth_confirm.description: The device rejected the stored local key. Enter the current key.

data_description.local_key: 16-character device-specific key. Reissued whenever the device is re-paired in Smart Life.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Poolex Silverline
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for this heat pump.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the heat pump on the LAN.
data_description.device_id: Must match the device that was originally added.

discovery_confirm.title: Add discovered Poolex Silverline
discovery_confirm.description: A heat pump was discovered at {host}. Enter its local key to finish setup.

data_description.local_key: 16-character device-specific encryption key from the Tuya cloud console.

model.title: Select device model
model.description: Choose your heat pump model. This sets the correct name in Home Assistant and pre-configures which sensors are available.

data_description.model: Select your exact model for accurate sensor availability. If unsure, choose Other / Unknown — sensors will be detected automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the heat pump.
error.invalid_auth: The local key was rejected by the device.

abort.device_id_mismatch: The supplied device ID does not match the original device.
abort.unverified_host: A LAN broadcast claimed this device is at a new IP, but the new host did not authenticate with the stored local key. The stored host was not changed.
abort.unsupported_product: This Tuya device is not a recognised Poolex / Silverline heat pump (productKey does not match any known model). If you believe this is a heat pump that should be supported, please open an issue with the productKey from the logs.

fault_E03.title: Water flow fault (E03)
fault_E03.description: The heat pump can't detect water flow. Check that the filter pump is running and the filter is clean. The heat pump halts heating until flow is restored. This card disappears automatically once the device clears the fault.

fault_E04.title: Antifreeze fault (E04)
fault_E04.description: Antifreeze protection has tripped — water in the heat exchanger is too cold. Raise the ambient temperature or stop operation until it's above the antifreeze threshold.

fault_E05.title: High pressure fault (E05)
fault_E05.description: Refrigerant high-pressure cutout activated. Likely causes: blocked airflow over the coil, refrigerant overcharge, or condenser fan failure.

fault_E06.title: Low pressure fault (E06)
fault_E06.description: Refrigerant low-pressure cutout activated. Possible refrigerant leak or expansion-valve issue — service required if it repeats.

fault_E09.title: Communication failure (E09)
fault_E09.description: Internal communication between the controller and the inverter has failed. The unit usually auto-recovers.

fault_E10.title: Inverter communication failure (E10)
fault_E10.description: The inverter is not responding. The unit usually auto-recovers on the next compressor cycle.

fault_P1.title: Defrost sensor fault (P1)
fault_P1.description: The defrost temperature sensor reports an invalid reading. Defrost cycles may be off-schedule until cleared.

fault_P3.title: Inlet sensor fault (P3)
fault_P3.description: The water-inlet temperature sensor reports an invalid reading. Pool temperature reporting may be wrong until cleared.

fault_P4.title: Outlet sensor fault (P4)
fault_P4.description: The water-outlet temperature sensor reports an invalid reading. The unit may operate without precise output temperature monitoring.

fault_P7.title: Coil sensor fault (P7)
fault_P7.description: The evaporator coil temperature sensor reports an invalid reading. Defrost timing may be affected until cleared.

auth_failed.message: The heat pump rejected the credentials. Re-authentication is required.

set_failed.message: Failed to update the heat pump: {reason}

preset_not_available_in_auto.message: Boost and silent presets are not available while the heat pump is in auto mode.
